purpose: Formal conformance substrate for composition-ref-v1. An external implementer who reproduces composition_ref byte-identical from the stated composition_artifact has a conformant implementation. composition_ref commits to the complete authorization lifecycle: delegation_ref (who authorized), dual-timestamps (authority_verified_at_ms + revocation_check_at_ms), revocation_ref (subsequent invalidation), and the action_ref that ties all four to a specific agent action.

vectors.description: Complete authorization lifecycle: pioneer-agent-001 executes payment.send under a delegation from giskard-self (delegation_ref). Authority was verified at T-10s and revocation was confirmed absent at T-5s before execution (dual-timestamps). The delegation was subsequently revoked (revocation_ref non-null). composition_ref commits to all four primitives as a single verifiable unit.

invariants.composition_ref_not_in_preimage: composition_ref does not appear in action_preimage — action_ref is determined solely by action_type, agent_id, scope, timestamp
invariants.independent_hashes: composition_ref = SHA-256(JCS(composition_artifact)); action_ref = SHA-256(JCS(action_preimage)); neither hash is derived from the other
invariants.delegates_not_replaced: delegation_ref and revocation_ref remain present in envelope independently; composition_ref is additive
invariants.scope_consistent: scope in composition_artifact matches scope in action_preimage and delegation_artifact and revocation_artifact

notes.delegation_ref: Cross-references delegation-ref-v1.fixture.json vector delegation-001 — same artifact, same hash.
notes.revocation_ref: Cross-references revocation-ref-v1.fixture.json vector revocation-001 — same artifact, same hash.
notes.dual_timestamps: authority_verified_at_ms (T-10s) and revocation_check_at_ms (T-5s) close the audit gap between delegation validity check and action execution.
notes.revocation_ref_non_null: This vector demonstrates post-execution revocation — the action was valid when executed; the delegation became invalid afterward. composition_ref captures this full timeline.
notes.tx_hash: Real Base mainnet anchor (pioneer-agent-001 Oasis payment 2026-04-13). Shared canonical reference across fixtures.
